stem: You want to explicitly turn on zero-noise extrapolation for an EstimatorV2 job by setting an individual option (not by choosing a resilience level). Which line does this?

explanation.correct: ZNE is controlled by the resilience sub-option `zne_mitigation`. Setting `estimator.options.resilience.zne_mitigation = True` enables zero-noise extrapolation directly; you can then tune `resilience.zne.noise_factors` and `resilience.zne.extrapolator`.

distractors.A: `dynamical_decoupling.enable` turns on dynamical decoupling (error suppression on idle qubits), not ZNE.
distractors.C: Resilience level 1 enables only readout mitigation (TREX); ZNE is added at level 2, so level 1 does not turn on ZNE.
distractors.D: `run()` accepts only the PUB list and `precision`; there is no `zne` keyword, so this raises a TypeError.
